memoryArtifacts.headline: Wardour Castle, Wiltshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Wardour Castle, Wiltshire, England
Built in the 14th century by John Lovell after marrying heiress Maud Holland.
Wardour passed back and forth between aristocrats and royalty until is was bought by th …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Lovel, KN, KG於1340年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒時，他的父親John Lovel26歲，母親Isabel LaZouche20歲。他於1372年與Maud de Holand結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年9月10日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Lovel, KN, KG于1340年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒时，他的父亲John Lovel26岁，母亲Isabel LaZouche20岁。他于1372年与Maud de Holand结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年9月10日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Lovel, KN, KG was born in 1340, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, his father, John Lovel, was 26 and his mother, Isabel LaZouche, was 20. He married Maud de Holand in 1372. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 September 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Lovel, KN, KG est né en 1340, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Lovel, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel LaZouche, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Holand en 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Lovel, KN, KG 1340 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lovel 26 und seine Mutter Isabel LaZouche 20. Er hat 1372 Maud de Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. September 1408 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Lovel, KN, KG è nato il nel 1340 nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, John Lovel, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel LaZouche, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Holand nel 1372. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 settembre 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Lovel, KN, KGが1340年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで生まれた時，父John Lovelは26歳，母Isabel LaZoucheは20歳であった。1372年にMaud de Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年9月10日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Lovel, KN, KG(이)가 1340년 영국 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lovel(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel LaZouche(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1372년 Maud de Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 9월 10일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Lovel, KN, KG nasceu em 1340, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lovel, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel LaZouche, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Holand em 1372. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Lovel, KN, KG родился в 1340 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lovel было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel LaZouche, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Holand в 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 сентября 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Lovel, KN, KG nació en 1340, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lovel, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel LaZouche, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maud de Holand en 1372. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
